zh.Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial: 美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Batchelder於1669年1月8日出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓時，她的父親Nathaniel Batchelder40歲，母親Deborah Smith30歲。她於1687年11月10日與Benjamin Lamprey在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1735年9月17日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Batchelder于1669年1月8日出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓时，她的父亲Nathaniel Batchelder40岁，母亲Deborah Smith30岁。她于1687年11月10日与Benjamin Lamprey在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1735年9月17日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Batchelder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): altered form of Batchelor , showing the folk-etymology influence of the word elder, with which it is not in fact connected.

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

variants.name: Bachelder
meanings: Altered form of English   Batchelder  . Compare   Bacheller  .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Batchelder was born on 8 January 1669, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, her father, Nathaniel Batchelder, was 40 and her mother, Deborah Smith, was 30. She married Benjamin Lamprey on 10 November 1687, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 17 September 1735, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Batchelder est née le 8 janvier 1669, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Nathaniel Batchelder, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Deborah Smith, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Lamprey le 10 novembre 1687, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 17 septembre 1735, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Batchelder am 8. Januar 1669 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nathaniel Batchelder 40 und ihre Mutter Deborah Smith 30. Sie hat am 10. November 1687 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten Benjamin Lamprey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 17. September 1735 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Batchelder è nata il il 8 gennaio 1669 nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Nathaniel Batchelder, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Deborah Smith, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Lamprey il 10 novembre 1687, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 17 settembre 1735, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Batchelderが1669年1月8日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Batchelderは40歳，母Deborah Smithは30歳であった。1687年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンでBenjamin Lampreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1735年9月17日に故郷で66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hampton, Rockingham Co., New Hampshire,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리
ko.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Jane Batchelder(이)가 1669년 1월 8일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nathaniel Batchelder(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Deborah Smith(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1687년 11월 10일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 Benjamin Lamprey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1735년 9월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.8 January 1669–about 17 September 1735: 8 de janeiro de 1669–aproximadamente 17 de setembro de 1735
pt.Hampton, British America: Hampton, Talbot, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Batchelder nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1669, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Nathaniel Batchelder, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Deborah Smith, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Lamprey em 10 de novembro de 1687, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 17 de setembro de 1735, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Hampton, Rockingham Co., New Hampshire,: хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham: паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты
ru.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Brit: хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Batchelder родилась 8 января 1669 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Nathaniel Batchelder было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Deborah Smith, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Lamprey 10 ноября 1687 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 17 сентября 1735 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Batchelder nació el 8 de enero de 1669, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, Nathaniel Batchelder, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Deborah Smith, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Benjamin Lamprey el 10 de noviembre de 1687, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 17 de septiembre de 1735, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
